name: McNealy Brown
message: [AI generated] McNealy Brown Ltd is a global procurement service provider based in the UK, founded in 1994. It offers procurement services for both public and private sectors, with special focus on railway materials, equipment, and machinery. It provides services like supply chain management, procurement strategy, contract management, value engineering, and tendering support. The company also delivers individualized procurement solutions tailored to meet the needs of specific projects.
